string.description: Text value with double-quote expansion or single-quote literal

integer.description: Integer variable type declared with typeset -i or integer builtin

float.description: Floating-point variable type declared with typeset -F or float builtin

array.description: Ordered indexed array with 1-based indexing by default in zsh

associative_array.description: Key-value associative array declared with typeset -A

glob.description: Extended glob patterns with qualifiers for recursive matching and file filtering

exit_status.description: Return value from last command; 0 is success, non-zero indicates failure
